rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE ROOSEVELT WATTS TRUST DTD. 6/7/06 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Successor Trustee Matt Woodbury's motion for summary judgment is GRANTED. The Court finds that there are no triable issues of material fact regarding decedent's intent to adopt Mr. Loughridge. (In re Estate of Ford (2004) 32 Cal.4th 160, 170-171.) Because the summary judgment burden is shaped by the applicable burden at trial and because the standard on equitable adoption is "clear and convincing" evidence, the Court finds that this burden has not been met. (Aguilar v. Atlantic Richfield Co. (2001) 25 Cal.4th 826, 850.) The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party seeking to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than January 15, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
